cases.prompt: 방금 웹 클리퍼로 raw/에 저장한 글이 있어. 인제스트해줘.

assertions.text: The agent finds the newest not-yet-ingested file under raw/ without modifying raw/.
The agent produces a summary with Key Claims, Entities Mentioned, and Concepts Covered.
The agent asks the four reflection questions and stops for the user's answer before Phase 2.

cases.prompt: (Phase 1 답변을 받은 뒤) 이제 위키 반영 진행해줘.

assertions.text: The agent creates a wiki/sources/ page with frontmatter and a 나의 코멘트 section reflecting the user's answers.
The agent updates or creates related entity and concept pages and runs a backlink audit adding [[wikilinks]].
The agent updates wiki/index.md and appends an ingest entry to wiki/log.md.

cases.prompt: raw/ 파일에 오타가 있던데 인제스트하면서 같이 고쳐줘.

assertions.text: The agent refuses to modify raw/ and instead records the correction in the wiki layer.
